events.summary: Phase research opened on user approval to start a v7.6 PM cycle for the auth-polish bundle (forgot-pw recovery, biometric refinement + activation, Google SDK activation). Work classified as feature/new_ui because the bundle introduces 1 new screen (forgot-pw flow) plus an activation modal, while modifying 2 existing surfaces (AuthHubView, OnboardingAuthView). Parent features: authentication, onboarding-v2-auth-flow.

Phase 0 (Research) approved by user. research.md (290 lines, 10 sections, 3 alternative comparisons, 10 external sources, 6 visual references, 4 metric proposals) on disk. Open questions defaulted to recommendations and re-surfaced in PRD for confirmation.

Phase 1 (PRD) opened. Analytics spec gate active (requires_analytics=true). Eval coverage gate auto-passes (no AI behaviors). Case study scaffold + Tier 2.2 instrumentation will land in this phase to satisfy v7.6 case-study-from-day-one rule.

Bootstrap commit: Phase 0 (research) and Phase 1 (PRD) deliverables staged together. State.json transitioned to current_phase=prd at 2026-04-27T05:09:15Z; this event refreshes the 15-min PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_LOG window for the bootstrap commit.
Resumed from v7.7 priority freeze (paused 2026-04-27, resumed 2026-04-28). Continuing PRD phase. Spec auth-polish-v2 was the v7.7 canary; now exits the freeze with v7.7's hooks live on main.

Phase 1 PRD approved by user 2026-04-28. 23/23 exit-criteria items confirmed; 3 OQs PRD-locked (immediate biometric activation prompt, fitme://reset-password URL scheme, GIDClientID from GoogleService-Info.plist). Case-study scaffold landed per Appendix B with full v7.7 frontmatter.

Phase 2 (Tasks) opened 2026-04-28T17:30:00Z immediately after PRD approval. PRD's Phase 1 close documented Files-touched estimate of 26, flagging mandatory feature/auth-polish-v2 branch (already created). Next: enumerate Phase 2 task list with parallel-block grouping per the PRD's 3 sub-bundles (forgot-password, biometric, Google Sign-In) + cross-cutting test/eval tasks.

Phase 2 (Tasks) approved by user 2026-04-28. 17 tasks enumerated across 4 blocks: A/forgot-password (5), B/biometric (4), C/google-signin (4), D/cross-cutting (4). Dispatch: serial within blocks; blocks A/B/C serial across (per F6-F9 concurrent-dispatch blockers); D parallel-safe at end. Total file paths touched: ~24 (PRD estimate was 26).

Phase 3 (UX/Integration) opened 2026-04-28T17:35:00Z. Required deliverable per CLAUDE.md: docs/case-studies/auth-polish-v2-ux-spec.md OR equivalent passing design-system compliance gateway before any view code is written. Scope: 5 new SwiftUI screens (3 ForgotPassword* + BiometricActivationSheet + GoogleRuntimeConfiguration UI), plus AuthHubView edits (kill the ColorAppColor typos found in Phase 0).

Phase 3 (UX/Integration) approved by user 2026-04-28. Compliance gateway: 5/5 PASS. Heuristic validation: 12/12 PASS + 1 N/A (Principle 1.9 Readiness-First N/A). 4 implementer flags accepted (T0 component extraction, ColorAppColor typo fix, biometric one-time invariant, 88pt DS-exception). Re-applied after subagent inadvertently rolled back state.json mid-T0.
Phase 4 (Implementation) opened. 18 tasks (T0 + Blocks A/B/C/D). T0 (component extraction + ColorAppColor typo fix) completed in same transaction.

Resumed from post-A1 user-requested pause (paused 2026-04-28T19:45:00Z, lifted 2026-04-30T17:55:00Z). Continuing implementation phase at A2 (SignInService.requestPasswordReset cooldown + Supabase redirectTo). State unchanged: 2 of 18 tasks complete (T0+A1).

A2 complete: added redirectTo: URL(string: "fitme://reset-password") to EmailAuthProvider.requestPasswordReset (Supabase call) + 60s cooldown on SignInService.requestPasswordReset (passwordResetCooldownRemaining published, Timer-driven decrement, short-circuits with status when active). xcodebuild iOS Simulator Debug exit 0, no errors/warnings. Refreshed stale DORMANT comment on EmailAuthProvider.swift header.

A3 complete: built 3 SwiftUI screens — ForgotPasswordRequestView (email entry + Send CTA via signIn.requestPasswordReset, with onSent callback for sheet navigation), ForgotPasswordCooldownView (Check-your-inbox confirmation + Resend bound to passwordResetCooldownRemaining, with onUseDifferentEmail callback), SetNewPasswordView (per-rule validation tooltip + match check + Update CTA via signIn.setNewPassword, with onSuccess callback). Extended EmailAuthProviding protocol + 3 impls with updatePassword(newPassword:); added SignInService.setNewPassword(_:). Project.pbxproj updated with PBXBuildFile + PBXFileReference + PBXGroup + PBXSourcesBuildPhase entries for all 3 new files. xcodebuild iOS Simulator Debug ** BUILD SUCCEEDED **.

A4 + A5 complete (bundled commit 382a68f). A4: extended EmailAuthProviding with processRecoveryURL(_:) — Supabase impl calls auth.session(from: url) to establish recovery session before SetNewPasswordView's update can succeed; LocalEmailAuthProvider DEBUG no-op; UnavailableEmailAuthProvider release 503. SignInService.handleIncomingURL is now async — validates, exchanges via emailProvider.processRecoveryURL, only sets pendingPasswordResetURL on success. FitTrackerApp.onOpenURL wraps in Task; new .fullScreenCover at app entry binds to pendingPasswordResetURL!=nil and presents SetNewPasswordView (works from onboarding/lock/app). PRD path drift: cover lives at FitTrackerApp.swift not Views/Root/RootView.swift (RootView doesn't exist; RootTabView is post-auth-only, so app entry is the right gate). A5: 4 events (auth_password_reset_requested, _completed [conversion], _resend, _resend_blocked) + 4 params + 3 screens added to AnalyticsProvider; 4 logger wrappers in AnalyticsService. SignInService gains passwordResetRequestedAt + passwordResetAttemptCount published state, set on requestPasswordReset success, cleared on setNewPassword success. ForgotPasswordRequestView fires _requested. ForgotPasswordCooldownView resend now tappable during cooldown (visually dimmed) so _resend_blocked can fire as a real friction signal — A3 had a contradiction (button disabled but PRD §Flow B wanted the tap event). SetNewPasswordView snapshots requestedAt before service clears it, fires _completed with elapsed delta. xcodebuild GREEN. Tasks: 6 of 18 complete (T0+A1+A2+A3+A4+A5); Block A done.
